title: Nylium: Reloaded
description: Refined nylium textures with extended sides and improved coloration.
body:
# Nylium: Reloaded
*Enhances nylium blocks by refining their coloration and extending their visual coverage for more aesthetically pleasing Nether landscapes.*

## Features
  - Removed greenish tint from warped nylium for a more cohesive color palette
  - Extended nylium textures down the sides for improved appearance
  - Recolored top textures of both crimson and warped nylium variants
  - Eliminated netherrack peek-through for more complete coverage

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!

## Credits
- [Crimson Nylium Top Fix](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/crimson-nylium-top-fix-4831213/) by: [Chubins](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/chubins/)
